title: M-4D0
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Fourdee}} {{Droid |type= |image= |name=M-4D0
"Fourdee" |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] |creator= |manufacturer= |line= |model= |class=[[Protocol droid/Legends|Protocol droid]] |cost= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |gender= |pronouns=new |sensor= |plating= |armament=[[Blaster/Legends|Blaster]] |equipment= |affiliation=[[Haj Shipping Lines]] }} '''M-4D0''', also known as '''Fourdee''', was a golden [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] that served as a porter droid aboard the [[Luxury liner/Legends|luxury liner]] ''[[Star of Empire]]''. In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], the [[Systems Infiltration Manager]] took over the liner and as a result many of the on-board [[Droid/Legends|droids]] attacked the passengers and crew. M-4D0 used a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] to shatter a [[Transparisteel/Legends|transparisteel]] [[Viewport/Legends|viewport]] and was instantly sucked out. ==Appearances== *''[[Galaxy of Fear: The Doomsday Ship]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' [[Category:Protocol droids]]
